rules.name: standard_return
rules.details: Our store offers a 30-day return window for most items. You can return products within 30 days of delivery for a full refund or exchange, provided the item is in its original condition with all packaging and accessories. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item.

rules.name: electronics_return
rules.summary: 14-day return window for electronics and audio products
rules.details: Electronics and certain high-value items may have a 14-day return period. To initiate a return, please contact our support team or use the online return portal. Item must be in original condition with all packaging and accessories.

rules.name: free_shipping
rules.summary: Free standard shipping on orders over $50
rules.details: We offer free standard shipping on orders over $50. Standard delivery typically takes 5-7 business days, while expedited options are available for an additional fee. You can track your order status using the tracking number provided in your confirmation email.

rules.name: manufacturer_warranty
rules.details: All electronics come with a manufacturer's warranty that covers defects in materials and workmanship. The warranty period varies by product but is typically 1 year from the date of purchase. We do not offer extended warranties, but third-party options may be available.

rules.name: fashion_return
rules.details: Clothing and footwear can be returned within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and with original tags attached. Intimate apparel and swimwear are final sale for hygiene reasons.

rules.name: kitchen_appliance_return
rules.details: Small kitchen appliances can be returned within 30 days if unused and in original packaging. Large appliances may require a restocking fee of 15%.
